title: Smooth-Bedwars
description: This is a Bedwars texture pack to make your Bedwars game more cool !
body: Smooth-Bedwars is built for players who demand both style and performance—featuring crisp, high-contrast textures for clearer combat, optimized visuals that boost FPS for ultra-smooth gameplay, and a clean, modern interface that keeps your focus locked on the fight—this pack doesn’t just make PvP easier, it makes it addictively satisfying.
